name: zola-mcp
description: Zola wedding planning tools for Claude — vendors, budget, guests, seating, events, registry, inquiries, and more

refresh_token.title: Zola Refresh Token
refresh_token.description: Mobile API JWT refresh token (~1 year lifetime). Run ./scripts/setup-auth.sh to capture from the Zola iOS app via mitmproxy.

tools.name: list_vendors
tools.description: List all booked vendors with details

tools.name: search_vendors
tools.description: Search for vendors by name within a category

tools.name: get_budget
tools.description: Get wedding budget summary with all items

tools.name: update_budget_item
tools.description: Update a budget item's cost or note

tools.name: list_guests
tools.description: List all guest groups with stats

tools.name: update_guest_address
tools.description: Update a guest group's mailing address

tools.name: get_seating_chart
tools.description: Get seating chart with tables and seats

tools.name: list_unseated_guests
tools.description: List guests not yet assigned a seat

tools.name: assign_seat
tools.description: Assign a guest to a seat

tools.name: get_inquiry_conversation
tools.description: Get conversation for a vendor inquiry

tools.name: list_events
tools.description: List all wedding events with RSVP counts

tools.name: get_gift_tracker
tools.description: View gift tracking and thank-you note status

tools.name: search_storefronts
tools.description: Search vendor marketplace by category and location
